name: highlight_risk
description: Light up the borders of every ward whose predicted fire risk is at or above a threshold (0.0 to 1.0). Call when the operator asks to show hotspots, high-risk areas, or wards above a certain risk level.

minRisk.description: Minimum risk score (0.0 to 1.0). Wards at or above this value get highlighted. Default to 0.6 if the operator does not specify.
